plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development tools. Slot game implementation, simulation, bonus systems, feature patterns, math model, and coding conventions.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA and testing tools. Test case generation, bug report templates, regression checks, and test automation patterns.

plugins.name: ta
plugins.description: Technical art pipeline tools. Asset import rules, texture optimization, shader guide, LOD settings, and performance budgets.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Game design tools. System spec templates, balance sheet validation, data table rules, and feature documentation.

plugins.name: sound
plugins.description: Sound design tools. Audio naming conventions, FMOD/Wwise integration patterns, audio asset management, and mixing guidelines.

plugins.name: pm
plugins.description: Project management tools. Sprint summaries, milestone tracking, meeting note templates, and cross-team communication helpers.

plugins.name: adb-mcp
plugins.description: Adobe MCP setup guide. Connect Photoshop, Premiere Pro, After Effects, Illustrator, InDesign to Claude via MCP with step-by-step GATE verification.

plugins.name: photoshop-mcp
plugins.description: Photoshop MCP setup guide. Connect Photoshop to Claude with 62+ self-extending tools, proxy server, and UXP plugin.

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Marketplace onboarding. Connects GS marketplace, detects role, installs relevant plugins in one command.
